failure_movement.justification: Wrong direction on empty (predicted drop from 4→0-1, but baseline was 0 and actual rose to 1). Wrong on unknown (predicted stable, actual -4: 26→22). Partial credit for wrong-answer direction (predicted shrink 1-2, actual -4; direction correct but magnitude too conservative).

trace_movement.justification: Completion tokens rose only +18.5 vs predicted +50-100 (right direction, magnitude off). Prompt tokens rose +98.3 contradicting 'stay similar'. merged_from metadata exists (values 12-13) partially supporting adjacency-merge claim, but no per-hit merged_from in retrieved[] as predicted.

side_effects.justification: Correctly flagged completion token rise (direction right). Failed to flag prompt token surge (+98.3, ~6.5%). 'Risk of regression is low' partially holds since single-session-preference was already 0.0 in iter024. One task still hits new 1536 ceiling with empty output, a missed risk call.
